subcodes.first_line: O friends and handmaidens of the Merciful! It is manifest and evident that 'Abdu'l-Bahá is infinitely kind towards you, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و اماء رحمن این واضح و عیانست که عبدالبهاء بینهایت بشما مهربان زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love and unity, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
